## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss urgent hiring needs and capacity planning to meet growing client demand.](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Immediate need to hire multiple roles: Ops Manager, Managing Editors, Account Managers, Technical Editor, Recruiter](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Planning for \~16 new account kickoffs in Q1 2024, requiring at least 3 new full pods](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [Shift towards hiring in "classes" for more efficient onboarding and training](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Consider restructuring pods for better scalability as the company grows](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)

## Topics

### Current Capacity and Workload

  - [Existing team members (Jess, Ida, Mariana) are near or at capacity](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Some accounts (e.g., Prophecy) experiencing challenges due to team overconfidence and incomplete onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Need to balance immediate client needs with long-term capacity building](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)

### Hiring Strategy

  - [Immediate hires needed:](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
      - [Ops Manager/Chief of Staff ($3k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
      - [2-3 Managing Editors (leveraging existing candidate pipeline)](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
      - [Account Managers (need to rebuild pipeline)](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
      - [Technical Editor with SEO or engineering background](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1873.0)
      - [Recruiter](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [Considering "hiring classes" for more efficient onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Aim to have new hires start early January, with full ramp-up by end of February](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)

### Scaling Challenges

  - [Kyle currently overextended; need to clone his role](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [New hires take \~2 months to fully ramp up](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [Ideal pod structure: 1 pod lead to 5 account managers, scaling to 15 account managers](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Consider restructuring pods as company grows (e.g., larger pods vs. more pods)](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)

### Content Strategy Improvements

  - [Marcel demonstrated a more efficient content strategy approach using competitor analysis and AI-generated outlines](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2055.0)
  - [Focus on scalable, templated approaches for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2156.0)
  - [Example: drug comparison content for Hans, using AI to create templates and hiring subject matter experts for review](https://fathom.video/share/RVs2vSceVkP3qHcQB5XLDkEoDpKDFynJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
